allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\sraa7\\Desktop\\edith"; $result = & npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $result | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) } | Where-Object { $_ -match "users-roles|members|admin|invites|permissions" } | Select-Object -First 20)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('scripts:', list\(p.get\('scripts',{}\).keys\(\)\)\); print\('devdeps:', list\(p.get\('devDependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:20]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['ai','anthropic','openai','vercel','llm']\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['ai','google','next','prisma','auth','react','lucide','tailwind']\)]")

Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ai\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('message'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('stream'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('data'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const {streamText} = require\('ai'\); const r = streamText.toString\(\); console.log\('ok'\)")
Bash(node -e "const ai = require\('ai'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ai\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.includes\('Stream'\) || k.includes\('stream'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {google} = require\('@ai-sdk/google'\); const {streamText} = require\('ai'\); async function test\(\) { const r = streamText\({model: google\('gemini-2.0-flash'\), messages: [{role:'user', content: 'hi'}]}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(r\)\); } test\(\).catch\(e => console.log\('error:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {google} = require\('@ai-sdk/google'\); const {streamText} = require\('ai'\); async function test\(\) { const r = streamText\({model: google\('gemini-2.0-flash'\), messages: [{role:'user', content: 'hi'}]}\); const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(r\)\); console.log\(proto.join\('\\n'\)\); } test\(\).catch\(e => console.log\('error:', e.message\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('exports',{}\).items\(\)]")
